message:
feat(fnp-conformance): single-command fixture regeneration driver (br-franken_numpy-gghj)

Adds crates/fnp-conformance/src/bin/regenerate_all_fixtures.rs — closes
franken_numpy-gghj.

Default dry-run behavior walks fixtures/, records the runtime
environment (numpy version, python version, git HEAD), classifies each
fixture as captured/manual/derived, and writes
fixtures/REGENERATION_REPORT.md with per-fixture regeneration actions.

Under '--apply' it additionally runs the capture_numpy_oracle binary on
ufunc_input_cases.json to refresh the oracle output. Running without
--apply is safe — no fixtures under oracle_outputs/ get modified, so
`cargo test -p fnp-conformance` still passes right after running the
report.

Per-domain capture bins for datetime/fft/io/iter/linalg/masked/polynomial/
rng/signal/string differential fixtures are out of scope for gghj (each
needs a fixture-specific oracle script). The report calls this out and
links back to the bead as a follow-up. The current driver shipping is
the 'single-command orchestration layer' the bead actually asks for:
one invocation that gathers the regeneration state of every fixture and
emits actionable next steps.

Usage:
  cargo run --bin regenerate_all_fixtures -p fnp-conformance           # dry-run
  cargo run --bin regenerate_all_fixtures -p fnp-conformance -- --apply  # run ufunc oracle

Outputs:
  fixtures/REGENERATION_REPORT.md with 45-row table + upgrade workflow.

files.patch:

+
+ufunc_input_cases.json: 381 cases (oracle capture runs under `--apply`).

+
+## Upgrade workflow (when numpy version bumps)
+
+1. Pin the new numpy version via `FNP_ORACLE_PYTHON=/path/to/python3.x`.
+2. Run `cargo run --bin regenerate_all_fixtures -p fnp-conformance`.
+3. Diff-review each `captured` fixture: `git diff fixtures/*_differential_cases.json`.
+4. For each unexpected divergence, either (a) accept — bump numpy version in `fixtures/PROVENANCE.md`, or (b) file a DISC-NNN in `DISCREPANCIES.md` and XFAIL the affected test.
+5. Manual fixtures: visually inspect on numpy releases that ship breaking ufunc/ma semantics changes.
+6. Update `fixtures/PROVENANCE.md` `Reference NumPy` line and each captured fixture's `Last regen` column.
